title: CobblePCEnhanced
description: Enhances the Cobblemon PC with upgrade tiers, automatic type-based box organization, smarter box mapping, and quality-of-life controls for managing Pokémon storage.
body:
# CobblePCEnhanced

CobblePCEnhanced improves the Cobblemon PC experience by adding upgrade progression, automatic type-based organization, smarter box handling, and quality-of-life tools for managing Pokémon storage.

The goal of the mod is to make large Cobblemon storage systems easier to use without replacing the core Cobblemon PC experience.

## Features

- PC upgrade system with multiple progression tiers.
- Increased storage capacity through upgrades.
- Automatic Pokémon sorting by primary type.
- Type-based box mapping.
- Automatic box naming based on type and index.
- Per-player PC organization support.
- Manual and automatic sorting controls.
- Search and sorting quality-of-life tools.
- Safer handling when Pokémon are moved between boxes.
- Built to stay close to the original Cobblemon PC interface.

## Current Focus

CobblePCEnhanced is designed as a unified PC enhancement mod.

Future updates are planned to expand PC quality-of-life features further, including mouse wheel box switching, IV display improvements, and custom PC wallpapers.

## Compatibility

- Requires Cobblemon.
- Built for Minecraft 1.21.1.
- Designed for Fabric.
- Should be installed on both client and server.

## Notes

CobblePCEnhanced does not aim to replace Cobblemon's PC.  
It enhances the existing PC with progression, organization, and quality-of-life features.
